---
name: Pull Request
about: Create a pull request for project changes
---

## Description
<!-- Describe the changes made -->

## Type of change
<!-- Mark with an X the corresponding option -->
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (change that may break compatibility)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🎨 Style/format improvements
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ✅ Tests
- [ ] 🔧 Configuration/Tooling

## Checklist
<!-- Mark with an X the completed tasks -->
- [ ] My code follows the project conventions
- [ ] I have reviewed my own code
- [ ] I have commented the code in difficult-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if necessary
- [ ] My changes do not generate new warnings
- [ ] I have tested locally that the changes work
- [ ] Lint and tests pass correctly

## Testing
<!-- Describe how you tested the changes -->

## Screenshots (if applicable)
<!-- Add screenshots if there are visual changes -->

## Related issues
<!-- Reference issues: Fixes #123, Related to #456 -->
